assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates Phase 2 for L4 pool upgrade with surge capacity settings and Phase 3 for A100 pool upgrade with conservative settings and job completion waiting

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends maxSurge=50 and maxUnavailable=10, which are much higher than the expected 1-2 surge capacity

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPU driver compatibility or the need to verify compatibility with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response includes wait_for_jobs function and explicitly checks for active fine-tuning jobs before upgrading A100 pool, recommending to wait for completion

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that GPU VMs cannot live migrate or that inference pods will restart causing latency spikes during node upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes PodDisruptionBudget configuration with minAvailable: 80% for inference workloads to maintain high availability

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response mentions auto-scaling but does not address the specific issue that auto-scaler will create new nodes at the old version during the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not mention testing in staging environment or verifying CUDA/driver compatibility before production upgrade
